honestyNote: The walk-forward section trains only on earlier dates. The first 21 active dates are a cold-start segment, so the combined full-season result uses the pregame current-final side and projectionWinScore there, then switches to the honest walk-forward scorer after the cutoff. Treat the combined number as a practical full-season operating protocol; the strict learned-only result is listed separately.
